title: Senior Software Engineer - Aptech - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Aptech - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Aptech. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Software Engineer to strengthen our Kolkata-based team.

About Aptech:
Aptech is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aptech!
